summary: Phase 1 RESEARCH for Captains Fish and Chicken. 3-agent SERP-grounded sweep (keywords, competitors, GEO/entity) on 2026-07-07. Eight local keyword pillars identified; nearest same-concept rival is Sugapeach Chicken & Fish Fry (North Liberty), clearest win is Long John Silver's (frozen menu). No paid volume tool connected, so all volume/difficulty metrics are Estimated or N/A — none fabricated. Scope held to the single 1616 1st Ave NE location; 3100 6th St SW excluded.

checklist.note: Single 1616 1st Ave NE location only; 3100 6th St SW excluded from all clusters
Keywords/entities derived only from owner-confirmed menu
All volume/difficulty Estimated or N/A; no fabricated numbers; competitors are real SERP-grounded businesses
Comparative claims flagged Estimated; closed competitors (Vivian's, Just Like Home) excluded as live rivals

researchSources.source: Yelp category pages (Fried Fish / Catfish / Soul Food / Wings / Seafood, Cedar Rapids)
Restaurant Guru / Restaurantji / OpenTable / Wanderlog / res-discover (directory cluster)
DoorDash / Uber Eats / Grubhub / Postmates store + category pages
KHAK local press (opening coverage, owner Ray Aqel)

primaryRival.name: Sugapeach Chicken & Fish Fry
primaryRival.note: Closest same-concept independent (est. 2016, CR roots, now North Liberty ~20-25 min away). Owns 'soul food'/'chicken fish fry' organic + own domain + delivery brand. WIN: Captains owns NE Cedar Rapids proximity + full seafood variety (perch/tilapia/red snapper/calamari/crab cakes/gizzards/livers/jumbo shrimp) + family fish deals up to 50pc + party pans that Sugapeach under-features.

clearestWin.name: Long John Silver's
clearestWin.note: Only national fried-fish brand locally; frozen pollock/cod fish & chips, no fresh catfish/perch/tilapia/snapper, no real chicken program, SW-side only. Captains wins on fresh-to-order + seafood variety + fish-AND-chicken breadth at comparable takeout price.

otherLocalIndependents.name: Crab House Seafood Boil & Bar
otherLocalIndependents.note: Dominates 'seafood/shrimp' SERP but Cajun boil concept, not fried fish+chicken+soul food; SW-side. Don't out-boil — own fried-basket + catfish + wings + soul food terms it ignores.

otherLocalIndependents.name: Harold's Chicken
otherLocalIndependents.note: Reopened 2026 (1st Ave SE / 16th Ave SW); direct wings/fried-chicken rival.

otherLocalIndependents.name: Two Bros Chicken & Fish / Hiphop Fish & Chicken / Juicy Crab Island / Iowa Soul Food Market / Mama Pearls (gizzards & livers)

nationalChains: KFC (multiple, incl. 1st Ave SE near corridor)
aggregatorsDominatingSerps: Restaurant Guru / Restaurantji / OpenTable / Wanderlog / res-discover
excludedClosedOrWrongMarket: Royceann's Soul Food (Iowa City, not CR)
competitorNotes.strategicRead: Aggregators + 'best/top 10' lists own most head SERPs; Captains has NO owned domain ranking (Yelp/Zmenu/DoorDash/Facebook answer branded queries today). Play: (1) reclaim branded + menu/hours/phone navigational SERPs with an owned schema-rich site; (2) win item-level + near-me long tails aggregators answer poorly; (3) become AI-citable via FAQ/list/definition content. BOFU-first (branded, near-me, catering, family deals).

quickWins: Own the branded SERP (name / menu / hours / phone) with LocalBusiness+Restaurant+Menu JSON-LD so the owned domain outranks Yelp/Zmenu/DoorDash
Fix + own 'Captains Fish and Chicken hours' (confirmed data gap) with OpeningHoursSpecification
Signature 'fried catfish Cedar Rapids IA' section (owner's most-popular item; thin local competition)
Capture freed 'soul food Cedar Rapids' demand (Vivian's closed; Captains already Yelp 'Soul Food' tagged)
Claim niche 'chicken gizzards and livers Cedar Rapids' (near-zero owned-page competition)
growth: Catering / Party Pans pillar page (party pans, family fish deals up to 50pc, party wings) — highest AOV, unowned locally
Own fried-basket seafood terms (jumbo shrimp basket, crab cakes, calamari/red snapper) vs crab-boil cluster
Family Meals & Deals page (family fish deal, fish+chicken combo, feed-4)

evidenceGaps: No paid keyword/volume tool connected — ALL search-volume and difficulty are Estimated or N/A; re-run with a volume tool to convert to Measured
Review counts thin/inconsistent (Yelp ~1, Facebook ~17, Google 4.4/208 aggregator-attributed only); no first-party-confirmed rating
Two-location NAP split (1616 1st Ave NE vs 3100 6th St SW) across Yelp/Grubhub/DoorDash — active citation-consistency risk; reconcile owner-side, SW excluded here
Hours conflict — res-discover Sun 11-8/Mon-Thu 11-10/Fri-Sat 11-11 vs one listing hinting late-night ~3am Fri/Sat; canonical hours unconfirmed by owner
No owned website/GBP confirmed as canonical entity source — brand grounded by third-party aggregators, weakening AI entity trust

Several menu entities (red snapper, crab cakes, calamari, gizzards/livers, party pans, kids meals) are owner-provided but largely UNVERIFIED in public SERP text — first-party publishing will corroborate
Competitor set is single-pass SERP sample (2026-07-07); local map-pack personalization may differ; landscape shifting (closures)
